taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Frontend Software Engineer
core_skills: Frontend fundamentals, UI architecture, Performance optimization, Accessibility, API integration
skill_match_scores: Frontend fundamentals:0.5, UI architecture:0.0, Performance optimization:1.0, Accessibility:0.0, API integration:1.0
must_have_quals: Professional experience working as a software engineer on production systems, Strong frontend fundamentals, including UI architecture, performance optimization, and accessibility, Experience building and integrating with APIs, Comfort working across the stack, even if your background leans frontend or backend, Experience collaborating with cross-functional partners such as product managers and designers, Ability to debug complex systems and reason about issues across frontend, backend, and data layers, Bachelor's degree or equivalent practical experience in Engineering, Computer Science, or a related field
preferred_quals: Experience working in product-driven engineering environments, Familiarity with GraphQL and modern frontend data-fetching patterns, Experience debugging or working with data-heavy or geospatial systems, Prior experience in roles that required close collaboration with non-engineering stakeholders
core_responsibilities: Build and ship product features across the frontend and backend, Develop user-facing experiences with attention to UI architecture, performance, and accessibility, Integrate frontend applications with backend APIs and services (primarily written in Go), Collaborate closely with product managers and designers, actively contributing ideas, tradeoffs, and technical perspectives, Debug and reason about issues across the stack, including identifying whether problems originate in the frontend, backend, or underlying data, Work with platform engineers and data partners to ensure product behavior aligns with real-world data and customer expectations, Contribute to code quality, documentation, and shared engineering practices, Deliver reliable, maintainable software that advances First Street’s mission to connect climate and financial risk
job_summary: First Street is the standard for Climate Risk Financial Modeling, aiming to connect climate and financial risk. The Fullstack Software Engineer will be responsible for delivering end-to-end features across frontend and backend systems, collaborating with product managers and designers to create intuitive user experiences.
